title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Rapido - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Rapido - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Rapido invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rapido:
Rapido is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rapido!
